etymology.description: ťöĻ(ťöĻ) (zhuńę, 'short-tailed bird') + ťöĻ(ťöĻ) (zhuńę, 'short-tailed bird') = two birds together -> representation of gathering or flocking of birds
etymology.interpretation: The character represents two birds together, emphasizing the idea of a pair or group of birds. The repetition of ťöĻ(ťöĻ) (zhuńę, 'short-tailed bird') suggests a flock or gathering, visually and conceptually reinforcing the notion of multiple birds.
